name: ModelObjectHatchAttributes
summary: The ModelObjectHatchAttributes class contains hatch attributes for model object hatches.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: Angle
properties.summary: The angle in which to draw the hatch.

properties.name: AutomaticScaling
properties.summary: Specifies whether automatic scaling is enabled. If disabled, custom scale values will be used (see ScaleX and ScaleY).

properties.name: BackgroundColor
properties.summary: The background color of the hatch.

properties.name: DrawBackgroundColor
properties.summary: Sets whether the background color will be enabled or disabled for the hatch. See also: BackgroundColor.

properties.name: FactorType
properties.summary: The type of the hatch factor.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of the hatch. If an empty string is given as hatch name it will become "None".

properties.name: ScaleX
properties.summary: The scale value of the hatch in the X-direction.

properties.name: ScaleY
properties.summary: The scale value of the hatch in the Y-direction.

properties.name: TrueBackgroundColor
properties.summary: The true color (rgb enabled) of the hatch background.

properties.name: TrueColor
properties.summary: The true color (RGB enabled) of the hatch.
